analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$76,300-$76,528 on May 1 00:08 UTC. Up +0.24% in 24h but consolidating. 13% gain in April now stalling. $80K double-top resistance still firm.

Brent crude oil surged +7.1% to $126/barrel — risk-off pressure
FOMC held at 3.5%-3.75% with hawkish dissent — most divided Fed since Oct 1992
Bond yields rising — capital rotating out of risk assets
US-Iran blockade and geopolitical tensions adding risk premium
Crypto market cap down 1.28% in 24h despite BTC slight uptick
Spot BTC ETF outflow streak ongoing
NFP April 2026 scheduled May 8 at 12:30 UTC (next major binary catalyst)
CPI April 2026 scheduled May 12 at 08:30 UTC
PPI April 2026 scheduled May 13 at 08:30 UTC
Regulatory positive: Clarity Act senate markup scheduled for May 2026
analysis.macro_backdrop: Hawkish Fed hold at 3.5-3.75% with oil surging to $126 Brent drives bond yields higher and squeezes risk assets. Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear). No major macro data release within 24h — ISM Manufacturing PMI today is medium-impact only. Next high-impact catalysts: NFP May 8, CPI May 12, PPI May 13.
